scenarios.name: local-2-0-base-baseline
scenarios.notes: Base Factorio 2.0 local-library baseline. This loads MIR without third-party local roots.

scenarios.name: local-2-0-space-age-baseline-if-installed
scenarios.notes: Space Age baseline for Factorio 2.0 binaries that include Space Age. If not installed, the audit reports an official-mod dependency failure.

scenarios.name: local-2-0-crucible-rigor-exact-dist
scenarios.notes: Required 2.3.5 compatibility gate for Planet Crucible 0.5.10 and Rigor Module 0.7.0 using the exact MIR candidate archive.

scenarios.name: local-2-0-bz-suite
scenarios.notes: Factorio 2.0 BZ resource suite without assuming the Space Age bundle.

scenarios.name: local-2-0-bob-core-suite
scenarios.notes: Core Bob scenario for legacy recipe-productivity compatibility checks.

scenarios.name: local-2-0-angels-core-suite
scenarios.notes: Core Angel scenario for legacy overhaul compatibility checks.

scenarios.name: local-2-0-bob-angels
scenarios.notes: Combined Bob and Angel legacy scenario. Dependency and modset conflicts are grouped rather than treated as automatic MIR bugs.

scenarios.name: local-2-0-krastorio2
scenarios.notes: Krastorio 2 legacy scenario without Space Age assumptions.

scenarios.name: local-2-0-space-exploration
scenarios.notes: Space Exploration legacy scenario, resolved from the local 2.0 library if present.

scenarios.name: local-2-0-pymodpack
scenarios.notes: pY pack wrapper scenario for legacy dependency and load evidence.

scenarios.name: local-2-0-nullius
scenarios.notes: Nullius legacy scenario, expected to classify overhaul ownership conservatively.

scenarios.name: local-2-0-ultracube
scenarios.notes: Ultracube legacy scenario, resolved from local archives if present.
